pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 semantics, failing to utilize Java 11 features or enforce Java 11 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version to a release compatible with Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions (like 1.16.18) may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 11 due to internal API changes in the JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target compiler settings with the unified release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard way to specify the target JDK version in modern Maven compiler plugin configurations, replacing the deprecated/legacy source/target pair for cleaner configuration.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Replace Lombok's `val` keyword with Java 10+ `var` to remove dependency on Lombok's type inference feature.
Replace Lombok's 'val' keyword with Java 10+ 'var' to remove dependency on Lombok for local variable type inference.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/G.general_idea: Replace wildcard Lombok import with explicit imports for used annotations.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/repositor.general_idea: Replace wildcard Lombok import with explicit imports for used annotations.

src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.general_idea: Remove unused Lombok 'val' import to clean up the codebase.
Replace Lombok 'val' with Java 10+ 'var' to remove dependency on Lombok for local variable type inference.
src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.after: final var payload = new Payload("json", "1234567890", payloadValue);

src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.general_idea: Remove Lombok 'val' import and replace usages with Java 10+ 'var' to eliminate dependency on Lombok for type inference.

src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Replace Lombok's 'val' keyword with Java 10+ 'var' to remove dependency on Lombok for type inference.
